title: Including a link in emails
excerpt:
Are there any plans to improve Monday’s email functionality? 
It would be great to allow some basic markdown if not complete HTML.

posts.author: edan (Edan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are there any plans to improve Monday’s email functionality?

It would be great to allow some basic markdown if not complete HTML.

posts.author: Paul_marcstone (Paul Doffing)
posts.cookedHtml: We completely agree with this. Our company runs a major implementation of Monday and we are really struggling with the limited email formatting functionality.

posts.author: jtho-seif (Jérémie)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I also agree with the need for improvement for the Monday’s email functionality.
